title: An Act to Amend the Laws Governing Elections
last_house_action: 6/10/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 6/11/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence

Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (S-317) READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (S-317) . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (S-317) . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
